title: Case of the Mysterious Floating Evas
display_title: Case of the Mysterious Floating Evas
wikitext:
[]: Case of the Mysterious Floating Evas             Quote Post by bladerj » Mon Dec 13, 2010 6:50 pm I was just rewatching 2.22 today, when i noticed in the scene where 00 grabs the angel core,she has no base and is not taking suport on anything !! In my first watches i didnt even noticed this, i just assumed she jumped on eva 01 back as a ladder, but she is a ground level when she starts to reach for the core, and then she grabs it hovering above ground, you can see the distance as eva 02 jumps to stab the core and then 02 is on the ground, then when the core is about to explode you see 00 without anything under her legs to keep her there.

[]:             Quote Post by Natsuka_Chie » Mon Dec 13, 2010 7:06 pm From what I can see on the BD, she's standing on the arms of the angel edit: pictures added. If you compare the height of the vagina-thingie on the angel's belly in both pics, she looks like she's on it's armpits (could be the chest too) or so:

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Mon Dec 13, 2010 7:14 pm lol animation.

[]:             Quote Post by Seele00TextOnly » Mon Dec 13, 2010 7:15 pm ...

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Mon Dec 13, 2010 8:07 pm That's not a "hanging on" pose. Hanging on would defeat the whole point; she's supposed to be pushing . It's either a screwup or deliberate fudging for effect.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Mon Dec 13, 2010 8:11 pm Watch the scene again. It definitely appears as though Unit-00 is standing on a solid surface.

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Mon Dec 13, 2010 8:32 pm Sachi wrote: Unit-00 is standing on a solid surface.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Dec 13, 2010 9:38 pm Eva-00 is definitely propped on Sahaq in the cut after she grabs the core. I'm honestly more curious how Eva-02 is hovering in mid-air the whole time... If you look at the establishing shots with Eva-01 skewered, the torso of the sky-Chozo looks nearly two Evas above the ground.

[]:             Quote Post by Naminator » Mon Dec 13, 2010 11:48 pm I think this is the "suspend your beliefs" part of cinema. Every movie and anime has these moments. And I actually didn't notice this before, THANKS for forever ruining that awesome scene for everyone!

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Mon Dec 13, 2010 11:53 pm Naminator wrote: And I actually didn't notice this before, THANKS for forever ruining that awesome scene for everyone!

[]:             Quote Post by Naminator » Mon Dec 13, 2010 11:57 pm NAveryW wrote: If they don't want people to notice this sort of thing they shouldn't put it in there to be noticed. Incidentally, I just listened to the Mulan audio commentary in which at least three "Hopefully the audience won't notice this" moments were pointed out by the crew. If they don't want people to notice them, why do they mention them?

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Tue Dec 14, 2010 12:12 am In this case it was more likely intentional than not. When digitally compositing the different visual elements together (Unit 02, the Angel, Unit 00), the placement is always done deliberately and it's not as hard to not notice this sort of cheat. At least, in the programs that I work with. It could be an oversight for all I know, but if that's the case it's a pretty big one.

[]:             Quote Post by Azathoth » Tue Dec 14, 2010 12:37 am Reichu wrote: Eva-00 is definitely propped on Sahaq in the cut after she grabs the core. I'm honestly more curious how Eva-02 is hovering in mid-air the whole time...

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Dec 14, 2010 1:24 am Azathoth wrote: She's got one progknife stuck in the core already, I figured she was hanging from it.

[]:             Quote Post by SaltyJoe » Tue Dec 14, 2010 1:46 am Couldn't it be that Unit-00 and Unit-02 were standing on the A.T. field Unit-01 generated? A.T. fields can be pretty solid in Rebuild, what with Clockiel's and Zeruel's shattering like glass after some major collisions.

[]:             Quote Post by ShadowGT » Tue Dec 14, 2010 3:37 am Oh Wunderbar! That scene is now ruined for me >_> I never even noticed that till i stumbled across this thread.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Dec 14, 2010 11:07 am @SaltyJoe: "Standing on AT Field" did cross my mind, though an establishing shot of the Evas doing just this honestly wouldn't have hurt, were this the intent. Further overanalysis must be conducted! Regarding ATFs' solidity, this is yet another thing NOT unique to NME. (E.g., Eva-01 ripping through Sachi's ATF like fabric, Eva-00 using a frickin' KNIFE to CUT through Sahaquiel's field, etc.) Just... in case you were implying that.

[]:             Quote Post by bladerj » Tue Dec 14, 2010 4:20 pm Reichu and the other guy i believe you just solved the mistery,when Asuka shouts before el stabo finale, you can see outside the cockpit, the at-field beneath her, meaning she could be on top of it. but Rei eva 00 is still magic becouse it would need to break eva 01 at field (like that weakling could),levitate and grab the cor, whereas Asuka came jumping from far, and if we look at the at field radious it must have been far far far away lol. i'll try to produce pictures.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Dec 15, 2010 2:09 am Okay, wasted some time... Here are my findings. (Warning, zillions of pictures.) First, I'm pretty sure the huge-ass ATF is Sahaquiel's the 10th Angel's, not Eva-01's. Here's Eva-01 after Shinji deploys the field: SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Dec 15, 2010 2:45 am The case of the mysterious floating Evas... Some initial establishing shots, to give you an idea of just how tall the sky-Chozo is: SPOILER: Show
